requirement_topic.zh: EMC与50 Hz电网频率兼容性
requirement_topic.zht: EMC與50 Hz電網頻率兼容性

summary.en: Sri Lanka operates a 50 Hz, 230 V single-phase / 400 V three-phase grid, aligned with IEC grid parameters. PV inverters must be configured for 50 Hz operation with frequency-response settings, ride-through windows, and protection relay parameters matching the CEB grid-code for the 50 Hz system. EMC requirements follow IEC standards applicable to power electronics equipment. SLSI may reference IEC 61000 series EMC standards for interference limits.
summary.zh: 斯里兰卡采用50 Hz、单相230 V / 三相400 V电网，与IEC电网参数一致。光伏逆变器须配置为50 Hz运行，频率响应设定、穿越窗口和继电保护参数需符合CEB 50 Hz电网规范。EMC要求遵循适用于电力电子设备的IEC标准。SLSI可参考IEC 61000系列EMC标准作为干扰限值依据。
summary.zht: 斯里蘭卡採用50 Hz、單相230 V / 三相400 V電網，與IEC電網參數一致。光伏逆變器須配置為50 Hz運行，頻率響應設定、穿越窗口和繼電保護參數需符合CEB 50 Hz電網規範。EMC要求遵循適用於電力電子設備的IEC標準。SLSI可參考IEC 61000系列EMC標準作為干擾限值依據。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62109-1/-2: Inverter EMC and safety requirements
CEB grid-code frequency and voltage parameters for 50 Hz system

summary.en: China also uses a 50 Hz grid, so frequency settings are nominally compatible. However, Chinese EMC standards (GB/T 17626 series, GB/T 14549) and utility-specific voltage/frequency window settings differ from IEC 61000 and CEB grid-code parameters in detail. Chinese EMC test reports to GB standards are not automatically recognised as satisfying IEC-based SLSI requirements.
summary.zh: 中国同样采用50 Hz电网，因此频率设定名义上兼容。但中国EMC标准（GB/T 17626系列、GB/T 14549）和公用事业特定电压/频率窗口设定，在细节上与IEC 61000和CEB电网规范参数有所不同。按中国GB标准出具的EMC测试报告不能自动认定满足基于IEC的SLSI要求。
summary.zht: 中國同樣採用50 Hz電網，因此頻率設定名義上兼容。但中國EMC標準（GB/T 17626系列、GB/T 14549）和公用事業特定電壓/頻率窗口設定，在細節上與IEC 61000和CEB電網規範參數有所不同。按中國GB標準出具的EMC測試報告不能自動認定滿足基於IEC的SLSI要求。

gap.en: While both China and Sri Lanka use 50 Hz grids, CEB and SLSI require inverter parameter settings and EMC evidence aligned with IEC standards, not GB standards. Exporters must confirm that inverter firmware frequency windows, voltage ride-through limits, and protective relay settings match CEB specification, and that EMC test evidence references IEC 61000 series limits rather than GB-only limits.
gap.zh: 尽管中国和斯里兰卡均采用50 Hz电网，CEB和SLSI要求逆变器参数设定和EMC证据符合IEC标准而非GB标准。出口商须确认逆变器固件频率窗口、电压穿越限值和继电保护设定符合CEB规格，且EMC测试证据引用IEC 61000系列限值而非仅限GB限值。
gap.zht: 儘管中國和斯里蘭卡均採用50 Hz電網，CEB和SLSI要求逆變器參數設定和EMC證據符合IEC標準而非GB標準。出口商須確認逆變器韌體頻率窗口、電壓穿越限值和繼電保護設定符合CEB規格，且EMC測試證據引用IEC 61000系列限值而非僅限GB限值。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — CEB grid-code parameters must be met; IEC 61000 EMC compliance expected by SLSI
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory under GB/T 17626 and GB/T 14549 for domestic Chinese market

source.publisher: Public Utilities Commission of Sri Lanka (PUCSL)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese GB EMC test reports and utility-specific settings do not automatically satisfy SLSI / CEB IEC-based EMC and grid-parameter requirements. Obtain IEC 61000-based EMC evidence and confirm inverter parameter settings meet CEB 50 Hz grid-code specifications.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国GB EMC测试报告和公用事业特定设定不能自动满足SLSI / CEB基于IEC的EMC和电网参数要求。需取得基于IEC 61000的EMC证据，并确认逆变器参数设定符合CEB 50 Hz电网规范。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國GB EMC測試報告和公用事業特定設定不能自動滿足SLSI / CEB基於IEC的EMC和電網參數要求。需取得基於IEC 61000的EMC證據，並確認逆變器參數設定符合CEB 50 Hz電網規範。
